mission.title: podman-container-tools: podman-restart.service Does Not Restart "unless-stopped" Containers
mission.description: podman-restart.service Does Not Restart "unless-stopped" Containers. This issue affects 11+ users.

steps.title: Identify podman-container-tools troubleshoot symptoms
steps.description:
Check for the issue in your podman-container-tools installation:
```bash
podman --version
podman info --format json | jq .version
```
Look for errors or warnings that may indicate the issue.

steps.title: Review podman-container-tools configuration
steps.description:
Review the relevant podman-container-tools configuration:
### Issue Description

Containers with `RestartPolicy=unless-stopped` are never started.

### Steps to reproduce the issue

1. Use docker to start a few containers with "restart: unless-stopped" configuration.
2.

steps.title: Apply the fix for podman-restart.service Does Not Restart "unless-stopped"…
steps.description:
#### Does this PR introduce a user-facing change?
```yaml
host:
  arch: arm64
  buildahVersion: 1.32.0
  cgroupControllers:
  - cpuset
  - cpu
  - io
  - memory
  - pids
  - rdma
  - misc
  cgroupManager: systemd
  cgroupVersion: v2
  conmon:
    package: conmon-2.1.7-2.fc38.aarch64
    path: /usr/bin/conmon
    version: 'conmon version 2.1.7, commit: '
  cpuUtilization:
    idlePercent: 98.56
    systemPercent: 0.5
    userPercent: 0.93
  cpus: 4
  databaseBackend: boltdb
  distribution:
    distribution: fedora
    variant: coreos
    version: "38"
  eventLogger: journald
  freeLocks: 2038
  hostname: localhost.localdomain
  idMappings:
    gidmap:
```

steps.title: Confirm podman-restart.service Does Not Restart… is resolved
steps.description:
Verify the fix by checking that the original error no longer occurs:
Test podman-container-tools to confirm the issue is resolved.
Confirm that the issue symptoms are gone.

resolution.summary: See the fix PR for the community-verified solution: https://github.com/containers/podman/pull/20962
